site.name: Shovon Mandal
site.title: Lecturer, Department of Computer Science and Engineering
site.affiliation: Northern University of Business and Technology Khulna, Bangladesh
site.tagline: Blockchain-Based Secure Digital Payments | NFC and IoT Transaction Security | Secure Distributed Systems
site.status: Open to graduate research opportunities and academic collaboration

about: I am a Computer Science and Engineering lecturer and graduate researcher working on blockchain-based secure digital payment systems, NFC-enabled cashless transactions, and secure distributed architectures.

My research focuses on blockchain security, IoT/NFC transaction security, applied cryptography, smart payment infrastructures, and embedded systems security. I am particularly interested in fully funded graduate research opportunities in the United States in secure distributed systems and financial technology security.

projects.title: Blockchain and NFC-Based Secure Cashless Payment Prototype
projects.description: A secure cashless payment prototype integrating blockchain-based transaction verification with NFC-enabled payment interaction.
highlights: Implemented Arduino and Python modules for NFC-based transaction processing.
Supported experimental workflow for secure cashless payment validation.
Related output: ICKECS 2024 paper on blockchain and NFC-based digital payments.

projects.title: IOTA-Based Payment Website and Decentralized Transaction Demonstration
projects.description: A web-based demonstration of IOTA-supported payment interaction and decentralized transaction flow.
highlights: Developed front-end and backend components for payment demonstration and user interaction.
Connected the implementation to decentralized transaction and node-confirmation research.
Related output: ICCIT 2024 paper on Q-learning-based message multicast in IOTA Tangle.
